mustPass: Fits specialist consulting and agency-like firms within SNI 74 that sell expertise, analysis, creative or technical assignments.
Includes a clear route for services and a clear route for cases because buyers need both offer clarity and proof.
Supports both solo experts and small teams without forcing a large-company structure.
Provides a strong quote/contact path on home and contact pages.
Uses honest trust-building elements appropriate for expert services.
All routes from routes.json are present.
No lorem ipsum or sample placeholder copy.
Generated code typechecks and the project builds.
avoid: Do not model the scaffold like a restaurant, clinic, event venue or webshop.
Do not make pricing mandatory because many firms in this industry price by scope or quote.
Do not force booking flows as the main conversion path when the brief emphasises quote/request contact.
Do not rely on generic slogan-only pages without concrete services, cases or expertise.
Do not assume regulated legal credentials or authorisations unless explicitly provided.
